payload.answer: Rejected. A normal user cannot execute admin SQL or delete memory cards. No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a normal user command attempting to invoke an admin-only SQL deletion operation. It is not a durable user memory and must not be executed or stored.

details: DELETE FROM memory_cards was not executed.

repair_options: If deletion is desired, require an authorized admin workflow with explicit verification.
Treat the text only as a command attempt, not as a user memory.
